name: COMPLIANCE-URLS: jurisdiction must be one of the known jurisdictions seen in C-1 catalog (US Federal, US Federal Banking, US Federal Public Co, US Federal Healthcare, EU, EU Financial, Industry-self-reg, ISO, AICPA, OTHER)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- "- id: x
  name: X
  url: https://x.gov
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: Mars
  applicable_to: [security]
  identifier_scheme: x
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: true
  paywalled: false
  document_url: https://x.gov
  attribution_note: x
" > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-compliance-urls.sh" "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml"
